data.title: Century Communities to open new neighborhood offering stylish townhomes in Riverside, CA on Sept. 25, 2025. Leader in online home sales.
data.description: A newly established neighborhood is adding vitality and contemporary townhomes to the core of the Inland Empire in RIVERSIDE, California. As of September 25, 2025, Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS), a renowned nationwide homebuilder, specializing in online home sales and recognized for being one of America's Most Trustworthy companies, is behind this development.

data.title: John Hancock closed-end funds to hold Annual Meeting on Feb 17, 2026, at 2:00pm ET at their offices in Boston.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in Boston, it was disclosed that the nine John Hancock closed-end funds will each hold their Annual Meeting of Shareholders on February 17, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The meeting will take place at the funds' offices located at 200 Berkeley Street.

data.title: Polkadot aims for $12.39 despite bearish market, currently trading around $3.86. Mixed signals noted in technical analysis.
data.description: The predicted price for DOT indicates a potential increase to $12.39, even though it is currently trading around $3.86. Analysis of technical indicators suggests conflicting signs, with a bearish momentum present alongside oversold conditions.

data.title: River Valley Community Bank introduces Carol Garcia as new VP helping in business development in Roseville.
data.description: In Yuba City, California, on September 25, 2025, River Valley Community Bancorp (OTC Markets: RVCB) alongside its subsidiary River Valley Community Bank, revealed the appointment of Carol Garcia as Vice President and Community Relations Officer. Garcia will operate from the recently established Roseville Branch at 2901 Douglas Blvd., Suite 140. Her role will primarily revolve around enhancing business growth and fostering community alliances in Placer County.

data.title: GE Vernova (NYSE: GEV) declares $0.25 per share dividend for Q4 2025, payable on Nov 17 to shareholders of record as of Oct 20. Dividend declarations dependent on earnings & financial condition.
data.description: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, GE Vernova (NYSE: GEV) issued a declaration that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on November 17, 2025, to shareholders on record as of October 20, 2025. The company stated that future dividend decisions will be contingent upon various factors including GE Vernova's earnings, financial health, cash needs, prospects, among others. Further details about GE Vernova are available for reference.

data.title: Marvell's stock surged after CEO's positive outlook, reflecting investor confidence in company's future prospects.
data.description: Shares of Marvell surged following a positive update from the company's CEO regarding its future outlook. The chipmaker's stock witnessed a significant increase in response to the optimistic reassurance provided by the chief executive. This development was well received by analysts and investors, leading to a rise in Marvell's stock price. The positive assessment of the company's prospects contributed to the rally, with the stock experiencing strong growth as a result.

data.title: Warner Bros. Discovery leads S&P 500 in September due to potential merger, acquisition news.
data.description: Stocks are surging due to possible merger and acquisition activity. Warner Bros. Discovery emerges as the top performer in the S&P 500 for September. Surprisingly, it leads the way as the fastest-rising stock of the month, in a report by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Cboe Global Markets trading near record high, with technical upgrade. Potential for further growth.
data.description: Cboe Global Markets has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating its improving technical performance. This global trading giant is trading near a record high and is approaching a key technical benchmark. Investors are now wondering if this positive momentum will be sustained in the future.

data.title: WesBanco declares quarterly cash dividend on its 6.75% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock for shareholders.
data.description: In Wheeling, West Virginia on September 25, 2025, WesBanco, Inc. (Nasdaq: WSBC), a multi-state bank holding company, declared a quarterly cash dividend for its 6.75% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred shares. The announcement came from the company's Board of Directors.
